instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Our cooking plan
task.initialEmail: Hi,||My parents said we can cook dinner for everyone on Friday. [1]Do you think pasta is a good idea?[/1]||[2]Can you come to my house at four o’clock?[/2] We need time to prepare everything.||[3]What dessert should we make?[/3]||[4]Should we ask my sister to help us?[/4]||Write soon||Emily

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Emily,||Thanks for your email. [1]Yes, I think pasta is a good idea because it is easy to make and most people like it.[/1]||[2]I can’t come at four o’clock, but I can arrive at half past four after my piano lesson.[/2]||[3]For dessert, we could make fruit salad because it is simple and healthy. We could serve it with ice cream too.[/3]||[4]In my opinion, we should ask your sister to help us because she is good at cooking and we will finish faster.[/4]||See you Friday,||Mia
